news.title: Genmab’s EPCORE Data Deepens Lymphoma Profile As Investors Weigh Upside
news.summary: Genmab (CPSE:GMAB) released new subgroup data from its pivotal Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 trial of epcoritamab plus rituximab and lenalidomide in relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma. The company also reported positive results from additional EPCORE studies in elderly patients with newly diagnosed diffuse large B cell lymphoma who are not candidates for standard chemotherapy.
